creator: Kelley (George H.)
description: How the Hillsdale Shopping Center in San Mateo, California increased traffic with a sophisticated program of advertising and promotion. Excellent footage of stores and shoppers in an upscale suburb. Some footage from this film was used in IN THE SUBURBS. Producer and Photographer: George H. Kelley. Kodachrome.
subject: Consumerism
Shopping centers
San Francisco Bay Area: San Mateo County
title: Shopping Can Be Fun: A New Concept in Merchandising
